course_description.overview: Early season sportive crossing Wiltshire Downs, White Horse hills, passing Uffington, Broadtown, Cherhill and Hackpen White Horses, Avebury stone circle, Lambourn and Marlborough Downs, with scenic villages and historical sites on decent road surfaces with minimal traffic.

key_segments.name: Uffington White Horse
key_segments.description: Oldest British chalk figure, dating back nearly 3000 years.

key_segments.name: Avebury Stones
key_segments.description: Neolithic stone circle in heart of Wiltshire Downs, constructed 2700-2400 BC.

key_segments.name: White Horse Hills
key_segments.description: Passes four White Horses: Broadtown, Cherhill, Hackpen; rolling climbs across downs.

course_description.difficulty_narrative: Challenging early-season test with 1400m climbing over 90 miles of scenic, undulating roads through downs and hills, suitable for fitness gauging.

logistics.getting_there: Start/finish at Memorial Hall, Shrivenham, Oxfordshire; free car parking available.
logistics.accommodation: Local villages or Swindon area; book early for event weekend.
logistics.registration_details: Online £40 via entrycentral.com or sportive.com (opens Nov 2025); £50 on day; tech T-shirt optional; sponsorship for Prospect Hospice optional.
logistics.bike_logistics: Road bike recommended; mechanical support by Mobile Cycle Medic; GPS files available; timing chip on ankle.
logistics.local_considerations: Early season (April) weather variable; changing/showers/toilets at HQ; photos free download.

final_verdict.one_liner: Classic southern England sportive blending history, hills and hospitality.
final_verdict.who_is_it_for: Early-season road riders seeking scenic challenge with charity vibe and full support.
final_verdict.is_it_worth_it: Yes, exceptional value for supported 90-mile downland adventure.
pro_tips: Enter early online for £40; order T-shirt at registration.
Train for rolling climbs; download GPS files.
Attach timing chip to ankle; sticker rider number on helmet for photos.
Opt for sponsorship or direct donation to Prospect Hospice.
